understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, progressing through all levels until the entire run reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece (P) in a direction by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably; selection switches between pieces (S) via CLICK on their exact pixel positions [x,y]; all goals must be occupied at once to win a level, with finite step budgets per level.
